reason: Across the first dozen frames the camera races along a brick ledge with no Mario visible, then Mario’s hat pops up from the square recess and he instantly bursts onto the grate while in a crouched long‑jump posture, moving backward at abnormal speed. This abrupt appearance and hyperspeed backward movement match the BLJ cues from the examples. It is not LBLJ or SBLJ (not on castle lobby pillars or stairs), nor any listed application.
